implementation.reconciliation_note: 2026-04-30 — second reconciliation. Initial 2026-04-30 lift downgraded status to pending (correcting 2026-04-10 false-positive). Audit during this resume found T3/T4/T7/T10 actually shipped on 2026-04-10 via PR #76 (commit e93d6e8) but never logged in state.json. T1 was already on main pre-feature. Real remaining work: T2 type extraction, T5 wire analytics calls in v2/StatsView.swift (constants + service methods exist; view does not call them), T6 a11y from 9 → 14+, T8 v2 checklist, T9 CI verify.

metrics.kill_criteria: Accessibility coverage drops below 70% after merge

transitions.note: 9 findings (2 P0, 3 P1, 4 P2). Lightest audit — best baseline compliance.
A11y + frame tokenization pass — screen architecture already solid

2026-04-20 open-items audit detected inconsistency: top-level current_phase=complete but all 10 implementation tasks still pending. No v2 code shipped. Downgraded to match reality. Six-feature roundup case study context updated accordingly.

2026-04-30 second reconciliation during stats-v2 resume. Discovered T3 (build v2/StatsView.swift), T4 (project.pbxproj v2 swap), T7 (StatsAnalyticsTests.swift, 93 lines), T10 (mark v1 historical) actually shipped 2026-04-10 via PR #76 / commit e93d6e8 — the original 'complete' status downgraded by the 2026-04-20 audit was over-corrected. Real state: implementation in_progress, with T2/T5(partial)/T6(partial)/T8/T9 outstanding. T1 was already on main pre-feature. Net: 5/10 tasks complete, 2 partial, 3 pending.

tasks.title: Create AppLayout enum
tasks.completion_note: AppLayout enum was already shipped on main at FitTracker/Services/AppTheme.swift:139-152 prior to stats-v2 resume. All 6 values present (chartHeight 158, emptyStateMinHeight 128, chipMinWidth 128, chipIdealWidth 144, chipMaxWidth 168, dotSize 8). No code change required from this feature; marker recorded retroactively at resume time.

tasks.title: Build v2/StatsView.swift
tasks.completion_note: Shipped via PR #76 / commit e93d6e8 on 2026-04-10. v2/StatsView.swift = 899 lines. F1 (AppMotion.quickInteraction at line 464), F2 partial (chart accessibilityLabel/Value at line 627–628; AXChartDescriptorRepresentable not added — pragmatic fix accepted), F3-F5 (AppLayout tokens used). T2 dependency NOT satisfied at time of completion: 3 nested types still inline at lines 9, 57, 244. Marker recorded retroactively at 2026-04-30 reconciliation.

tasks.title: Update project.pbxproj
tasks.completion_note: Shipped via PR #76 / commit e93d6e8. pbxproj has v2 group entry at line 861 (StatsView.swift in v2/ folder), build phase entry at line 1273. v1 file kept as PBXFileReference (line 851) per v2 convention. Marker recorded retroactively.

tasks.title: Instrument 4 analytics events
tasks.partial_note: Event constants defined in FitTracker/Services/Analytics/AnalyticsProvider.swift:76-82 (statsPeriodChanged, statsMetricSelected, statsChartInteraction, statsEmptyStateShown). AnalyticsService has logStats* methods (per StatsAnalyticsTests.swift). But ZERO Analytics calls in FitTracker/Views/Stats/v2/StatsView.swift — events never fire in production. Real wiring still owed.

tasks.title: Full accessibility pass
tasks.partial_note: 9 a11y annotations in v2/StatsView.swift (accessibilityLabel/Value/Element/Hint). Audit target was 14/15+ (from v2-audit-report.md a11y baseline 27% → target 90%). Period picker labeled (line 383), metric chip labeled (lines 503-506), chart container labeled+valued (lines 626-628). Still missing: granular per-data-point a11y, empty-state a11y, axis labels.

tasks.title: Analytics tests
tasks.completion_note: FitTrackerTests/StatsAnalyticsTests.swift exists, 93 lines, tests AnalyticsService.logStats* methods emit correct events. NOTE: tests pass independently of T5's view-wiring gap — they exercise the service layer directly, not view → service integration. So green T7 does not validate that T5 events actually fire from the view. Marker recorded retroactively.

tasks.title: Mark v1 historical
tasks.completion_note: v1 file FitTracker/Views/Stats/StatsView.swift has historical header (lines 1-5) and types renamed *_V1_Historical (StatsPeriod_V1_Historical, StatsFocusMetric_V1_Historical, MetricSeriesPoint_V1_Historical, StatsView_V1_Historical). Shipped via PR #76 / commit e93d6e8. Marker recorded retroactively.

corrigendum.note: Lift_reason above is incorrect: v7.7 had already SHIPPED 2026-04-27 via PR #144 (merge 01b9e11) at the time of this lift; state.json reconciled in PR #158.
